title: uzbek tili
description:
minecraftni uzbek tiliga tarjimasi
tajimani asosiy qismini google translator qiladi
agar xatoliklar topilsa telegram @Sultonov

o'rnatilgandan keyin til sozlamalaridan tilni uzbek tiliga o'tkazish kerak
body:
EN
this resource pack adds new translation of uzbek language
most of the words translated by google translator
if you find any mistakes in translation contact me in telegram [@Sultonov](https://t.me/Sultonov)

# !! After installing resource pack you need to change the language to uzbek from language settings

translated:
1. Minecraft
2. Sodium
3. Xaero's Minimap
4. Xaero's Worldmap
5. Just Enough Items

UZ
minecraftni uzbek tiliga tarjimasi
tajimani asosiy qismini google translator tarjima qilgan
agar xatoliklar topilsa telegram [@Sultonov](https://t.me/Sultonov)

# !! o'rnatilgandan keyin til sozlamalaridan tilni uzbek tiliga o'tkazish kerak

tarjima qilingan:
1. Minecraft
2. Sodium
3. Xaero's Minimap
4. Xaero's Worldmap
5. Just Enough Items
